SEARCH
Package com.unimib.assignment3.repository

Interface TeamRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Team,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Team,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Team,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Team,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Team,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Team>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Team,Long>
public interface TeamRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Team,Long>
TeamRepository interface for managing Team entities.

Provides methods for CRUD operations and custom queries related to teams, employees, supervisors, and tasks.

  • Method Details

    • findByTeamId

      Optional<Team> findByTeamId(Long teamId)
      Find a team by its ID
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team to retrieve
      Returns:
      the team with the given ID, or empty if not found

    • deleteById

      void deleteById(@NonNull Long teamId)
      Delete a team by its ID.
      Specified by:
      deleteById in interface org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Team,Long>
      Parameters:
      teamId - must not be null. The ID of the team to delete.

    • findAll

      @NonNull List<Team> findAll()
      Retrieve all teams.
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Team,Long>
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Team,Long>
      Returns:
      all teams

    • findBySupervisorPersonId

      List<Team> findBySupervisorPersonId(Long supervisorId)
      Find teams by supervisor's ID.
      Parameters:
      supervisorId - supervisor's ID
      Returns:
      list of teams

    • findByEmployeesPersonId

      Team findByEmployeesPersonId(Long employeeId)
      Find the team by a specific employee's ID.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee
      Returns:
      the team associated with the employee

    • findByTasksTaskId

      Team findByTasksTaskId(Long taskId)
      Find the team by a specific task's ID.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the ID of the task
      Returns:
      the team associated with the task

    • findTasksByTeamId

      @Query("SELECT t.tasks FROM team t WHERE t.teamId = :teamId") List<Task> findTasksByTeamId(@Param("teamId") Long teamId)
      Find tasks associated with a specific team ID.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team
      Returns:
      list of tasks

    • findSupervisorByTeamId

      @Query("SELECT t.supervisor FROM team t WHERE t.teamId = :teamId") Supervisor findSupervisorByTeamId(@Param("teamId") Long teamId)
      Find a supervisor by team ID.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team
      Returns:
      the supervisor associated with the team

    • findEmployeesByTeamId

      @Query("SELECT t.employees FROM team t WHERE t.teamId = :teamId") List<Employee> findEmployeesByTeamId(@Param("teamId") Long teamId)
      Find employees by team ID.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team
      Returns:
      list of employees associated with the team

    • findTasksInTeamIdByTaskState

      @Query("SELECT t_task FROM team t JOIN t.tasks t_task WHERE t.teamId = :teamId AND t_task.taskState = :taskState") List<Task> findTasksInTeamIdByTaskState(@Param("teamId") Long teamId, @Param("taskState") TaskState taskState)
      Find tasks in a specific team by their state.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team
      taskState - the state of the tasks to retrieve
      Returns:
      list of tasks in the team with the given state

    • findEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryGreaterThan

      @Query("SELECT d FROM team t JOIN t.employees d WHERE t.teamId = :teamId AND d.monthlySalary > :monthlySalary") List<Employee> findEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryGreaterThan(@Param("teamId") Long teamId, @Param("monthlySalary") double monthlySalary)
      Find employees with salary greater than a specified amount in a specific team.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team
      monthlySalary - the salary threshold
      Returns:
      list of employees in the team with a salary greater than the threshold

    • findEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryLessThan

      @Query("SELECT d FROM team t JOIN t.employees d WHERE t.teamId = :teamId AND d.monthlySalary < :monthlySalary") List<Employee> findEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryLessThan(@Param("teamId") Long teamId, @Param("monthlySalary") double monthlySalary)
      Find employees with salary less than a specified amount in a specific team.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team
      monthlySalary - the salary threshold
      Returns:
      list of employees in the team with a salary less than the threshold

    • findEmployeesInTeamIdWithEmployeeRole

      @Query("SELECT d FROM team t JOIN t.employees d WHERE t.teamId = :teamId AND d.employeeRole = :employeeRole") List<Employee> findEmployeesInTeamIdWithEmployeeRole(@Param("teamId") Long teamId, @Param("employeeRole") EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Find employees with a specific employee role in a specific team.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the ID of the team
      employeeRole - the employee role to filter by
      Returns:
      list of employees in the team with the given role
